items.title: Berkshire was a net seller of stocks in Buffett's final quarter as CEO
items.description: During Warren Buffett's last quarter as CEO, Berkshire Hathaway sold more equities than it bought, continuing to whittle away at its big Apple and Ban...

items.title: This week’s most overbought stocks include Deere and Quanta Services
items.description: Investors piled into names like Deere and Quanta Services this week, sending the 14-day relative strength index for both names above 70.

items.title: The average tax refund is up 14%. These stocks could see a boost, Bank of America says
items.description: Whether taxpayers are spending or saving their refunds, a slate of stocks could be poised to benefit, the firm said.
